Senior Writer - F/M/NB – Novaquark – Freelance – Fully-remote | Ruty Rutenberg | 23 comments

Guess what?! The Age of Bhaarat is looking to bring on some writing talent for multiple seniority-levels, starting with Senior Game Writers! If you'd like to work with me and our talented team, we'd love to see your stuff! 

For those within India or Indian Nationals living abroad, please email jobs@taragaming.com or DM Mohammed Mohideen directly!

For candidates outside of India, please apply here: https://lnkd.in/evxfyJ_B

If you know of others who might be a great fit, please comment and share to spread the visibility of the post. We look forward to your submissions!

NOTE: I am not a Recruiter. Please respect our Recruiting Team by applying through the proper channels. 

Novaquark. Join The NQ Way // Tara Gaming Limited | 23 comments on LinkedIn
